name: Exemption from Brewer Bond Requirements

eligibility.description: Applies to taxpayers who reasonably expect to be liable for not more than $50,000 in beer excise taxes for the calendar year and who were liable for not more than $50,000 in the preceding calendar year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Qualifying small brewers are exempt from the requirement to execute and maintain a federal surety bond to cover excise tax liabilities.
